error_signature: only one item showing up in the chat UI
title: Chat UI only displaying one message
symptom: Despite multiple records in the data preview, only one message appears in the chat UI. The logs show all entries, but the repeater does not render them correctly.
applies_when: Using a custom JavaScript formula to parse SSE-like responses
not_this_if: Repeater is configured correctly to handle arrays
Data is not in SSE format
root_cause: The issue arises from how the SSE-style string is parsed. The original parsing method split on 'id:' which did not align with how the repeater expected the data format, leading to only one message being rendered.
fix_steps: Modify the custom formula to split the string only on newlines.
Extract lines that start with 'data:', parse each line individually, flatten the results, and filter out any empty entries.
agent_instruction: Update the custom formula to correctly parse the SSE-style string and ensure the repeater receives the expected data format.
